steps.title: Use the reason after because
steps.content: The sentence explains that ballet is connected to Osage history because Maria and Marjorie Tallchief, two major twentieth-century ballet dancers, were Osage.

steps.title: Choose the fitting word
steps.content: Choice B suggests determination despite an obstacle, Choice C means random, and Choice D means unexpected. The Tallchief connection gives a clear reason that ballet is an appropriate medium for Osage stories. The answer is A.
